Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 17th, 2008 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: February 3rd, 2009 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material and some violence
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, F-Rated, Triple
Geographical setting: South Carolina
Plot point: Bigotry, Child Abuse, Child Neglect, Coming of Age, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Revenge, Suicide, Widow/Widower, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent

Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Overbrook Entertainment, Donners’ Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
